subject: [PATCH 11/19] nfsd: fix FL_SLEEP being set unconditionally for all LOCK types

2026-06-09.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the NFS server code where the FL_SLEEP flag was being set unconditionally for all lock types, including non-blocking ones. The issue was caused by a bitmask test that was introduced in a previous commit. This patch replaces the bitmask test with explicit equality checks to ensure that the FL_SLEEP flag is only set when necessary.
